# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL logical server."
      }
    },
    "sqlServerLocation": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Azure SQL resources."
      }
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Administrator login name for the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Administrator password for the SQL server."
      }
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "appdb",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Azure SQL database."
      }
    },
    "databaseEdition": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Basic",
        "Standard",
        "Premium"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Edition of the Azure SQL database."
      }
    },
    "databaseRequestedServiceObjectiveName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Basic",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Service objective/SKU for the Azure SQL database."
      }
    },
    "allowAzureServices": {
      "type": "bool",
      "defaultValue": true,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Allow Azure services and resources to access this server."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "firewallRuleName": "AllowAzureServices",
    "allowAzureStartIp": "0.0.0.0",
    "allowAzureEndIp": "0.0.0.0"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('sqlServerLocation')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "condition": "[parameters('allowAzureServices')]",
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
          "name": "[variables('firewallRuleName')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "[variables('allowAzureStartIp')]",
            "endIpAddress": "[variables('allowAzureEndIp')]"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('databaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('sqlServerLocation')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('databaseRequestedServiceObjectiveName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('databaseEdition')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": 2147483648,
        "requestedServiceObjectiveName": "[parameters('databaseRequestedServiceObjectiveName')]",
        "zoneRedundant": false,
        "readScale": "Disabled"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "databaseResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"
    }
  }
}
